## 2024-06-25 - Avoid modifying auto-generated NAPI bindings
**Learning:** Running `pnpm build` in N-API packages (like `packages/markdown`) updates auto-generated binding files (`index.js` and `index.d.ts`). If you do not intend to change the API, modifying these files can lead to regressions like API breakages or fatal runtime package version mismatches.
**Action:** When working on Rust performance optimizations in N-API packages, ALWAYS check `git status` after running `pnpm build`. If the auto-generated binding files were unintentionally modified, use `git restore --staged <file>` and `git checkout <file>` to discard the changes before committing.
